nextToken.description: If nextToken is returned, there are more results available. The value of nextToken is a unique pagination token for each page. Make the call again using the returned token to retrieve the next page. Keep all other arguments unchanged. Each pagination token expires after 24 hours. Using an expired pagination token will return an HTTP 400 InvalidToken error.

serialNumber.description: The hardware serial number of the device.

environmentId.description: The ID of the environment the device is associated with.

currentSoftwareSetId.description: The ID of the software set currently installed on the device.

desiredSoftwareSetId.description: The ID of the software set which the device has been set to.

pendingSoftwareSetId.description: The ID of the software set that is pending to be installed on the device.

softwareSetUpdateSchedule.description: An option to define if software updates should be applied within a maintenance window.

lastConnectedAt.description: The timestamp of the most recent session on the device.

lastPostureAt.description: The timestamp of the most recent check-in of the device.

createdAt.description: The timestamp of when the device was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the device was updated.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the device.

lastUserId.description: The user ID of the most recent session on the device.

desktopArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the desktop to stream from Amazon WorkSpaces, WorkSpaces Secure Browser, or AppStream 2.0.

desktopEndpoint.description: The URL for the identity provider login (only for environments that use AppStream 2.0).

desktopType.description: The type of streaming desktop for the environment.

activationCode.description: The activation code to register a device to the environment.

softwareSetUpdateSchedule.description: An option to define if software updates should be applied within a maintenance window.

maintenanceWindow.description: A specification for a time window to apply software updates.

type.description: An option to select the default or custom maintenance window.

startTimeHour.description: The hour for the maintenance window start (00-23).

startTimeMinute.description: The minutes past the hour for the maintenance window start (00-59).

endTimeHour.description: The hour for the maintenance window end (00-23).

endTimeMinute.description: The minutes for the maintenance window end (00-59).

daysOfTheWeek.description: The days of the week during which the maintenance window is open.

applyTimeOf.description: The option to set the maintenance window during the device local time or Universal Coordinated Time (UTC).
